content.text:
The test passes immediately (as expected per the spec context note). The existing `>=2` threshold in `isLoyalCustomer` correctly excludes customers with 1 year. There's no failure to verify because the implementation already satisfies this requirement.

## Step 4-6: No empty function or runtime error needed

Since the existing implementation already correctly handles this case (the loyalty threshold is `>= 2` years, and 1 year is below threshold, so no discount is applied), the test passes on activation.
